items.title: Bretton AI raises $75 million to use AI to combat financial crime
items.description: With new funding from Sapphire Ventures and Greylock Partners, the startup is upending anti-money laundering prevention at top financial firms.

items.title: America borrowed $43.5 billion a week in the first four months of the fiscal year, with debt interest on track to be over $1 trillion for 2026
items.description: "The longer lawmakers wait, the higher the price for Americans," warned Maya MacGuineas, president of the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget.

items.title: This CEO wants to do for hearing aids what she helped do for shapewear at Spanx
items.description: Laurie Ann Goldman, who helped turn Spanx into a global powerhouse, is now CEO of Audien Hearing.

items.title: The civil war inside American Airlines may not be all CEO Robert Isom’s fault
items.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

items.title: Why that $2 trillion software stock wipeout didn’t derail the AI bull market
items.description: 75% of companies in the S&P 500 have reported Q4 earnings, and profit per share across those companies is 12% higher than it was a year ago.
